label_verbatim: FIRST: The name of the converting partnership immediately before the conversion is
rationale: Pre-conversion partnership name. Matches entity.name convention for domestic filings (the partnership exists in Maine pre-conversion).

label_verbatim: SECOND: [ ] Limited Partnership (top-left checkbox at y≈420)
rationale: Unnamed /Btn checkbox for resulting-entity-type radio option 'Limited Partnership' (enum value: 'limited_partnership'). Position: top-left of the 2x2 SECOND grid.

label_verbatim: SECOND: [ ] Limited Liability Limited Partnership (bottom-left checkbox at y≈396)
rationale: Unnamed /Btn checkbox for 'Limited Liability Limited Partnership' (enum value: 'limited_liability_limited_partnership'). Bottom-left of grid.

label_verbatim: SECOND: [ ] Corporation (top-right checkbox at y≈419)
rationale: Unnamed /Btn checkbox for 'Corporation' (enum value: 'corporation'). Top-right of grid.

label_verbatim: SECOND: [ ] Limited Liability Company (bottom-right checkbox at y≈396)
rationale: Unnamed /Btn checkbox for 'Limited Liability Company' (enum value: 'limited_liability_company'). Bottom-right of grid. Filler engine must bind by index/rect for these unnamed widgets.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The name of the resulting entity is (the name must satisfy the organic law of the surviving entity)
rationale: Post-conversion name of the surviving entity. Must comply with the surviving entity's organic-law naming requirements (e.g., LLC suffix per 31 MRSA §1508; LP suffix per 31 MRSA §1308). Same shape as MBCA-21 / MBCA-20.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: The future effective date of the conversion (if other than date of filing of the Articles) is — (Not to exceed 90 days from date of filing of the Articles)
rationale: Optional future effective date capped at 90 days post-filing. Matches MBCA-21 / MBCA-20 conversion.future_effective_date convention.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: All of the statements required to be set forth in the organizing documents for the resulting entity are attached as Exhibit ___
rationale: Inline exhibit letter for the new entity's organizing-document provisions. Form text instructs that the appropriate formation form (MLPA-6-1, MLLC-6, or MBCA-6-1) must be attached. Matches MBCA-21 / MBCA-20.

label_verbatim: DATED ___ (top-right of converting-partnership signature block)
rationale: Date the Articles of Conversion are signed by the authorized representative.

label_verbatim: (authorized signature) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity widget. Shape D (matches MBCA-11 / MLLC-12 / MBCA-21 / MBCA-20). Form's page-1 footnote specifies 'at least one partner OR any duly authorized representative' may sign.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1. Likely populated with the converting partnership's pre-conversion name (entity.name).

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [2]
rationale: Cover-letter row 2. Likely populated with the bundled formation-form's entity (conversion.new_entity.name) for SOS routing — same bundling pattern as MBCA-21 (MLLC-6 / MLPA-6) and MBCA-20 (MNPCA-6-1).

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite tier 'hold_for_pickup'.

label_verbatim: 24-hour expedited filing
rationale: Expedite tier '24h_next_business_day'.

label_verbatim: Immediate expedited filing
rationale: Expedite tier 'immediate_same_day'. Bare 'cover' field-id (the '5' suffix is missing — same template anomaly as CORP_CLKRA-3 and GP_MPA-1).

label_verbatim: Total fee(s) enclosed: $
rationale: Total fees (base $150 per page-0 header plus expedite premium).

label_verbatim: (Name of contact person)
rationale: Contact name.

label_verbatim: (Daytime telephone number)
rationale: Contact phone.

label_verbatim: (Contact email address for this filing)
rationale: Filing-specific contact email.

label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
rationale: Annual-report reminder email (applies to surviving entity post-conversion).

label_verbatim: (Name of attested copy recipient)
rationale: Recipient name.

label_verbatim: (Firm or Company)
rationale: Recipient firm.

label_verbatim: (Mailing Address)
rationale: Recipient street.

label_verbatim: (City, State & Zip)
rationale: Recipient city/state/zip combined.
